headlines.title: U.S. strikes two locations in Iran near Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The U.S. military hit two locations in Iran near the Strait of Hormuz, according to a U.S. official. NBC News’ Matt Bradley explains what this means for the war with Iran.

headlines.title: Source: DOJ investigating suspicious oil trades timed around Iran war
headlines.description: The Justice Department is investigating a series of oil market trades that right before important moves related to the war with Iran. At least four trades worth $2.6 billion are being examined. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains the timing of the bets.

headlines.title: Iran-backed groups targeted U.S. facilities in Iraq 600 times, U.S. official says
headlines.description: The U.S. is urging the government to break with Tehran-backed militia groups following more than 600 attacks against U.S. diplomatic facilities.

headlines.title: Tennessee Republicans pass map dividing up state’s lone majority-Black district
headlines.description: Tennessee’s Republican-led Legislature passed a new congressional map dividing up the state’s lone majority-Black district, swiftly responding to the U.S.

headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report on the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: Tracking the DOJ's effort to get U.S. voter registration data
headlines.description: The Justice Department is seeking voter registration list data from all 50 states and the District of Columbia over the past year.

headlines.title: Contact tracing underway after passengers left ship before first reported hantavirus case
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of the hantavirus outbreak is heading toward the Canary Islands in Spain. Contact tracing is underway in multiple countries including the United States after passengers left the ship before the first reported case. NBC News' Matt Bodner reports on the latest details from the outbreak.

headlines.title: Teen says judge’s order for her release from immigration detention had her family screaming with joy
headlines.description: Olivia Andre, 19, has been held at the Dilley immigration facility in Texas for nearly two months after her family was released. A judge said she must be freed.

headlines.title: Christian missionary hailed as ‘holiest man alive’ pleads guilty to abusing boys in Texas
headlines.description: Daniel Savala, who preached for decades in an Assemblies of God-run college ministry, was sentenced to 30 years in prison without the possibility of parole.

headlines.title: Blake Lively asking Justin Baldoni to pay legal fees after settlement
headlines.description: Blake Lively is asking "It Ends With Us" co-star Justin Baldoni to pay for damages and legal fees not long after a federal judge signed off on a settlement between the two in their long-running legal dispute. NBC News' Chloe Melas has more on the case.

headlines.title: A new federal bill aims to protect pregnant women held in prisons and jails
headlines.description: The proposed legislation follows an investigation by Bloomberg Law and NBC News that found mistreatment of pregnant women in local jails.

headlines.title: What we know about the hantavirus outbreak so far
headlines.description: NBC News' Dr. Akshay Syal breaks down everything you need to know about the hantavirus outbreak that has claimed three lives so far.
